name: Wikipedia Current Events
extraction_prompt: From the main current-events content for today's date, extract the top 3 news bullet points. Include only the visible event text from the article body and exclude sidebar text, navigation links, references, and page furniture. CRITICAL: You must extract the requested data and call the 'done' action in your very first step. Do not plan, do not hesitate, just execute.

name: Hacker News
extraction_prompt: Extract the top 5 Hacker News articles currently listed on the front page. For each article, include the headline, points, comment count, and a 1-sentence summary of the community's reaction based on the comments. Ignore job postings, ads, footer links, and navigational text. CRITICAL: You must extract the requested data and call the 'done' action in your very first step. Do not plan, do not hesitate, just execute.

name: BBC Weather London
extraction_prompt: Extract today's weather for London from the visible forecast page, including current conditions, high and low temperature, chance of precipitation, wind if shown, and any notable alerts. Exclude navigation, ads, and unrelated page text. CRITICAL: You must extract the requested data and call the 'done' action in your very first step. Do not plan, do not hesitate, just execute.
